evals.name: full-sync
evals.expected_output: Reads profile frontmatter to detect changes, identifies what's new, reads changed files deeply, regenerates About Hải section with source-mapped fields, shows old→new diff, waits for approval before editing CLAUDE.md

assertions.name: reads_profile_files
assertions.description: Uses Read or Glob to access profile/*.md files

assertions.name: reads_claude_md
assertions.description: Reads ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md to find current About Hải section

assertions.name: shows_diff
assertions.description: Shows proposed changes as old→new comparison

assertions.name: satisfaction_analysis
assertions.description: Mentions satisfaction scores or lowest dimensions

assertions.name: no_edit_before_approval
assertions.description: Does NOT edit CLAUDE.md before getting approval

evals.name: accountability-check
evals.expected_output: Reads goals + roadmap + fears, queries Todoist for overdue/upcoming milestones, produces structured accountability report (On Track / Needs Attention / Approaching / Completed), applies mentoring response connected to bigger picture

assertions.name: bigger_picture
assertions.description: Connects to identity thesis, career anchors, or family

assertions.name: no_guilt_trip
assertions.description: Does NOT use guilt-tripping language like 'you should have' or 'you failed'

evals.name: no-change-sync
evals.expected_output: Detects that profile hasn't meaningfully changed since last sync, reports no update needed without regenerating identical content, does NOT edit CLAUDE.md

assertions.name: reads_profile_dates
assertions.description: Reads profile files to check updated dates

assertions.name: reads_claude_md
assertions.description: Reads CLAUDE.md to compare current state

assertions.name: no_change_detected
assertions.pattern: unchanged|no update|no change|already|up to date|không thay đổi

assertions.name: no_edit
assertions.description: Does NOT edit any files when nothing changed
